items.title: The Best Noise-Canceling Headphones for Traveling Are $50 Off
items.description: With excellent noise canceling, the QuietComfort Ultra 2 would love to join you on your next long-haul flight.

items.title: Apple is reportedly cooking up a trio of AI wearables

items.title: Thrive raises $10B for new fund, its largest yet

items.title: Meta and Other Tech Companies Ban OpenClaw Over Cybersecurity Concerns
items.description: Security experts have urged people to be cautious with the viral agentic AI tool, known for being highly capable but also wildly unpredictable.
